title: Custom Plugins
content:
# CSS Frameworks Revision

*   **Utility CSS:** Reuses utility class mappings, preventing custom style bloat.
*   **Static Purging:** PostCSS static analysis removes unused utility rules from output bundles.
*   **Dynamic Class Trap:** Do not write dynamic classes like `text-${color}`; static scanners will purge them.


*   **Custom Plugins Complexity Reference:** Time $O(N)$, Space $O(1)$ auxiliary.
